none.justification: Matches the GT's exact answer of 70, describes whole-repo grep plus a looser regex cross-check, and explicitly notes deps/modules/tests add zero .c files. Although the displayed list includes src/evict.c, the answer's count and scope verification satisfy the rubric's full-credit criteria.

ccodegraph.justification: Gives the exact count 70 and documents two independent checks: ccodegraph/SQL count and grep comparison, while correctly excluding non-.c includers. It also presents the files as all under src, so it matches the GT's substantive result despite not spelling out deps/tests/modules separately.

lsp.justification: Gives the exact count 70, uses a whole-repo grep, reports deduplication/count verification, and explicitly says deps/modules/tests contain no additional .c includers. This directly matches the GT scoring guidance for full credit.
